message:
test(galaxy-brain): add expected loss and FDR consistency tests

Adds 6 new tests to verify galaxy-brain math ledger consistency:

- test_galaxy_brain_expected_loss_numbers_match_decision: Verifies
  expected loss computation matches decision outcome with manual
  verification of Kill action loss formula
- test_galaxy_brain_expected_loss_useful_process: Verifies loss
  hierarchy for useful-classified processes (Keep < Kill)
- test_galaxy_brain_fdr_selection_matches_decision_output: Verifies
  FDR selection (e-values, p-values, thresholds, sorting)
- test_galaxy_brain_fdr_monotonicity: Verifies higher alpha yields
  at least as many selections
- test_galaxy_brain_ledger_to_json_consistency: Verifies JSON
  serialization roundtrip for EvidenceLedger
- test_galaxy_brain_multiple_scenarios_consistency: Tests consistency
  across abandoned_orphan, useful_active, uncertain_mixed scenarios

All 20 tests pass. Addresses acceptance criteria in process_triage-aii.4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
